target: 29. Hizuru Minakata
Hizuru Minakata
...It's me.
July 22nd. I boarded the ferry bound for Hitogashima that departed at exactly 11 a.m.
I wasn't ever supposed to return. It's been 14 years since I last came back...
If you're coming too... It's been 14 years...
If it weren't for that message, I wouldn't be here.
It was yesterday…
An untitled audio file had somehow been added to my voice recorder app.

I thought it might be you,
but if it were you, you'd have added a title.
I would too.
When I played it, there was a woman's voice I had never heard before.
The recording quality couldn't be called good... The audio was choppy and full of noise...
But the contents were... Enough to make me pack my bags for my first trip home in 14 years.
Nagu... sensei... can you hear... me? Please listen carefully...
Right now... on Hitogashima... Something terrible... is happening...
The Shadows... that girl... Haine is... going to...!!
The 24th... the summer festival... Everyone will be killed by the Shadows... Everyone... on the entire island...
The only one... who can stop it... Is a person named... Shinpei Ajiro...
But... it's impossible for him alone... We have to... join forces...!!
So please... Please come to Hitogashima! Please help... Shinpei...
Please... lend us your power, Sensei... Please...
The voice likely belonged to a teenager... Maybe a high school student. There was a Wakayama accent.
And, she knew "her" name... --That is all.
(This is my <color=#GF_TIPS_072>only lead</color>...)
(Who is she? Why does this woman know about me--)
Ushio!!
(...!? What is with this guy... suddenly...)
…Whoa!!?
(Sweating profusely and burying his face like that...)
(Isn't he suffocating!? No, maybe suffocation is the goal!? Is he suicidal!?)
(How interesting! This guy is quite unique!!)

Eh!!?
Ah…!
I'm sorry, I'm sorry!! I-I-I didn't mean to...!!
(...What? He's... apologizing!?)
(How ordinary!!!!)
I... I'm so sorry...!!
(A dream that makes you jump up in a cold sweat... Hmm... depending on the content, it might be good material for a novel.)
Are you okay? You were groaning quite a bit... Did you have a nightmare?
A... dream...?
U-Um... Have you ever... been shot by a gun?
Huh!?
(Is this guy still half-asleep?)
Are you... really okay?
Ah… no, nothing…
(What was I thinking... There's nothing more boring than listening to someone else's dream...)
(It doesn't seem like good material...)
Thank you for sailing with us--
(That crew member on the ramp just now... No, that man's Shadow...)
(It clearly moved the moment it was about to be stepped on... In other words, he is a "Shadow"...!!)
(The credibility of that message just went up a notch...)
Heyyy!! Welcome back, "Shin-chan"!!
(Shin-chan...?)
Good work on the long trip~~~~~!!
...Shin-chan. Shin...

Shinpei…
Ajiro… Shinpei…?
(Was that the boy from earlier? No, it couldn't be...)
(Anyway, I have to meet with that old man.)
